title: Traveler's Notebook: CicLAvia
excerpt: I started filming early on Sunday morning, thinking I would do a vlog about how we like to spend our weekends together at home, but it wasn't a typical day. I may still try and do a weekend vlog sometime…
body:
I started filming early on Sunday morning, thinking I would do a vlog about how we like to spend our weekends together at home, but it wasn't a typical day. I may still try and do a weekend vlog sometime if you all are interested in seeing how our life rolls when both JC and I are home with Jack. This particular Sunday was unique because we all got on bikes and enjoyed CicLAvia. They close down the streets of LA to create a 6 mile path, and the next one is coming up soon. We had a fun filled day and a couple weeks later I was able to craft in the studio. Here's another Field Trip + Crafting video for you.

SUPPLIES: Midori Traveler's Notebook (The turquoise kraft insert I am using was a gift from my mom, who went to the Traveler's Notebook flagship store when she was visiting Tokyo.) |
Simon Says Stamp inks | Amy Tangerine Rise & Shine collection | Tim Holtz Hearts Mask | Cutter Bee scissors | Amy Tangerine bike stamp | Amy Tangerine washi tape | Coleto Pen Set
